description: Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBrown leather strap with grooved pattern and a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite coloured watch face with two dials brand logo and branding on watch faceQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
